## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress, challenges, and next steps for content creation and SEO efforts across various client accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Positive meeting with Ramp co-founders, indicating potential for significant growth and hiring needs](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Focus on more aggressive content strategy for HomeBase by targeting higher difficulty keywords](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Explore removing review steps to accelerate content production using AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Onboard and assign tasks to new writers for keyword research and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)

## Topics

### Ramp Meeting and Growth Potential

  - [Met with Ramp co-founders, a prominent startup, which went really well](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Ramp's head of SEO gave green light to shift all SEO work to GrowthX over time](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Need to prepare for rapid scaling and hiring to support Ramp's growth](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)

### HomeBase Content Strategy

  - [Seeing good ranking results for high-volume keywords like "how to calculate annual income"](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Opportunity to go more aggressive on targeting higher difficulty, higher volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Can overproduce content initially, then refresh/update later in the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)

### Content Production Workflow

  - [Exploring removing review steps and using AI for critiquing/editing to accelerate production](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Could batch produce large volumes (e.g. 400 articles overnight) then have writers refine](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Allows focusing on specializing in different content types and refreshing older content](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

### Writer Onboarding and Assignments

  - [5 new writers brought on to assist with competitive research, keyword research, article generation](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Sadira working on assigning tasks and setting up workflow for writers](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Aim to have writer assignments ready by end of week for next week's article production](https://fathom.video/share/NxNBU7KdCREJ6ftVxEwezenZ8AZZAqs2?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
